items.title: Trump Says Saudi Arabia Can Buy F-35 Fighter Jets. Lockheed Martin Stock Gets a Boost.
items.description: The president’s statement came a day after Seaport analyst Richard Safran reiterated a bullish call on the stock.

items.title: Dubai Airshow: Boeing, GE, Embraer Sign Big Money Deals With UAE
items.description: The aerospace industry turns its attention to the Dubai Airshow this week. The world's largest aerospace companies — jet builders, engine manufactures and military contractors that design fighter planes — are all gathering at the Dubai Airshow, which runs Monday through Friday. Companies will showcase new products and compete for some of the industry's most lucrative contracts. This year's...

items.title: Boeing Ramps Up Patriot Missile Production as Demand Surges
items.description: As global tensions rise, Boeing prepares to triple seeker deliveries for Patriot systems

items.title: Boeing, Saab, and BAE Plot Trainer Jet Power Move--Hawk Successor Could Shake Up Market
items.description: A potential T-7 alliance may disrupt the UK's Red Arrows replacement race--and tilt the $3.7B trainer market.
